name: ssot-fl-model
description: SSOT to executable functional model, decomposition, and FCOV plan without fixed-IP shortcuts

items.content: Read and validate <ip>/yaml/<ip>.ssot.yaml as the only source of truth
items.detail: Extract function_model transactions, state variables, invariants, cycle_model latency/handshake/ordering rules, scenarios, coverage goals, error behavior, debug observability, and quality gates. Decide whether any reusable helper semantically matches this SSOT. If not, author the model directly from the SSOT rather than adding an IP-specific fixed branch.
items.criteria:
SSOT file was read
Every function_model transaction is listed
Every cycle_model rule affecting expected behavior is listed
Reusable-helper use is justified by semantic match, or direct model authoring is selected
Missing behavior is escalated as [SSOT QUESTION] with exact field names

items.content: Generate model/functional_model.py with FunctionalModel.apply(txn) in the active IP root
items.detail: Write an executable Python reference model independent of RTL. The model must implement the actual SSOT transaction vocabulary, state updates, side effects, error cases, invariants, and reset behavior. Do not emit unrelated AXI/APB/memory/cpu helper behavior unless the SSOT explicitly describes that behavior.
items.criteria:
functional_model.py exists
FunctionalModel.apply(txn) dispatches every SSOT transaction or returns a precise unsupported transaction tied to an SSOT question
Model state variables trace to function_model.state_variables
Expected outputs are computed from SSOT behavior, not observed RTL
No IP-specific common_ai_agent generator branch was added

items.content: Generate model/decomposition.json tracing FL submodels to SSOT sections in the active IP root
items.detail: Decompose the model into protocol, register/CSR, memory/FIFO, datapath, FSM/scenario, error, security/safety, debug/observability, and cycle submodels when present in SSOT. The unit list must drive RTL partitioning, TB agents, and coverage planning.
items.criteria:
decomposition.json exists
Each unit has kind, source_sections, rtl_candidates, and verification_impact
Units cover all SSOT sections that affect behavior
complete=true only when no behavioral source section is unassigned

items.content: Generate cov/fcov_plan.json before RTL signoff in the active IP root
items.detail: Plan functional bins from scenarios, transaction types, protocol/header fields, state transitions, error cases, reset/clear behavior, debug/status observability, security/safety cases, and cycle/backpressure rules as applicable. This plan is the closure target for TB-gen and coverage.
items.criteria:
fcov_plan.json exists
planned_before_rtl=true
Every scenario has at least one bin
Every function_model transaction has at least one bin
Every cycle_model/error/FSM/debug requirement affecting behavior has a bin or explicit waiver/escalation

items.content: Run FL self-check and write model/fl_model_check.json in the active IP root
items.detail: Execute the generated Python model self-check. The report must include pass/fail, transaction coverage over SSOT function_model.transactions, invariant checks, reset checks, error-case checks, and coverage-bin count. A pass without transaction traceability is rejected.
items.criteria:
fl_model_check.json exists
passed=true
Every SSOT transaction id/name is represented in transaction_results or equivalent traceability
Invariant/reset/error checks pass
Report points to functional_model.py and current SSOT
